response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of strong full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, but the resume shows limited explicit evidence of production GenAI delivery, RAG/vector database work, or customer-facing technical leadership at the staff level required. Python is not listed among core skills, and cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz. Worth a screening call to probe depth of recent AI-agent work.
strengths: Deep full-stack engineering background with TypeScript/Node.js and 15+ years shipping production systems
Current role involves MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, directly relevant to the JD
Strong software craftsmanship signals: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, talks, and open-source leadership
concerns: No demonstrated production GenAI, RAG, or vector database delivery on the resume
Python not listed in skills; cloud experience appears limited to AWS CDK
No clear customer-facing technical discovery or staff-level consulting experience with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow work at re:cinq
Missing Python and broad cloud platform depth
